description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet with a two-tone design, featuring a natural wood grain top and a painted light gray body. The front side has two open shelves on the left and two panel drawers with round knobs on the right, providing both display and storage options. The sides are solid and feature simple recessed paneling, while the back is plain wood with two circular cutouts, likely for cable management. The cabinet stands on short, slightly flared legs, giving it a stable and classic appearance. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and suitable for use in living rooms, entryways, or urban public spaces. The finish is matte, with visible wood texture on the top and smooth painted surfaces elsewhere.
description: A sturdy, two-tone wooden cabinet with open shelves, drawers, and a natural wood grain top, featuring a classic design and matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves on the left and two drawers with round knobs on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, light gray painted panel with simple recessed detailing.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a plain wood surface with two circular cutouts, likely for cable management.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid painted panel and leg design.
